actor_claims.quote_text: On July 25, 2013, the Board held a regularly scheduled in-person meeting.
the meeting proceeded as a meeting of the Special Committee
By invitation of the Special Committee, representatives from BofA Merrill Lynch and Goodwin Procter were also present throughout the meeting.
By invitation of the Special Committee, representatives from BofA Merrill Lynch and Goodwin Procter were also present throughout the meeting.

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: CSC/Pamplona submitted a preliminary indication of interest at an all-cash purchase price of $18.50 per share.
CSC/Pamplona submitted a preliminary indication of interest at an all-cash purchase price of $18.50 per share.
an acquisition of Mac-Gray by its portfolio company, CSC
Pamplona was committed to provide 100% of the capital required to consummate the transaction
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: committed to provide 100% of the capital required to consummate the transaction

bid_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a proposal for an all-cash purchase price of $20.75 per share

Party A reiterated in a telephone call to a representative of BofA Merrill Lynch that its previous indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share was its best and final offer

Party B also submitted a revised indication of interest with a purchase price that Party B valued at $21.50 per share, including $19.00 of cash to be paid at closing and the remaining per share price to be paid in the form of options to be issued to Mac-Gray stockholders

coverage_results.reason: The source window describes requests for exclusive negotiations and an earlier denial of an exclusivity request, but does not state that exclusivity was granted.

event_claims.description: BofA Merrill Lynch contacted strategic and financial parties identified by the Special Committee as part of the sale process.
event_claims.quote_text: BofA Merrill Lynch contacted the strategic and financial parties identified at the June 24th Special Committee meeting

event_claims.description: CSC/Pamplona submitted a final-round proposal for an all-cash purchase price of $20.75 per share and requested exclusive negotiations.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a proposal for an all-cash purchase price of $20.75 per share

event_claims.description: Party A reiterated that its prior all-cash indication of interest was its best and final offer.
event_claims.quote_text: Party A reiterated in a telephone call to a representative of BofA Merrill Lynch that its previous indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share was its best and final offer

event_claims.description: Party B submitted a revised indication of interest valued at $21.50 per share, including cash and options.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, Party B also submitted a revised indication of interest with a purchase price that Party B valued at $21.50 per share

event_claims.description: Party C did not submit a revised indication of interest or reiterate its prior indication of interest.
event_claims.quote_text: Party C did not submit a revised indication of interest or reiterate its prior indication of interest of an all-cash purchase price of $16.00 to $17.00 per share nor did it specify any reasons in connection therewith.

participation_count_claims.quote_text: preliminary indications of interest received from Party B, Party C and CSC/Pamplona as well as the Party A June 21 proposal
the four bidders conducted business and legal due diligence
